content:
Are you using an older version of Android?

A beta has recently been released that fixes crashes when retrieving images from large emails. It will make it's way into the next stable release soon. I suspect It may resolve the issue for you. https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/releases/tag/THUNDERBIRD_18_0b3

If the issue is still present after the next update, or you think the issue is different, please complete a bug report on github with a debug log attached.

Submit bug report here: https://github.com/thunderbird/thunderbird-android/issues

Guide to collect debug log: https://thunderbird.github.io/thunderbird-android/docs/latest/user-guide/troubleshooting/collecting-debug-logs.html
creator: platform34

content:
OP Question, google translated: Good morning I have changed the password of the certified email but I cannot change it even on the smartphone on which I manage the mail through the Tunderbird app.

Non capisco cosa intendi con "cambiare la password di una posta raccomandata". Potrebbe essere un problema di Google Translation. Puoi chiarire? Stai criptando le email usando SMIME o PGP?

Hai ricevuto una risposta migliore pubblicando nel forum di supporto italiano linkato qui sotto. https://forum.mozillaitalia.org/index.php?board=49.0
